title: deer-flow.forge.session.created v1
description: A Forge session was created (Anvil station, trial card stamped). Highest-volume forge.* channel: every bead picked up by a patron emits one of these. Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py::emit_forge_session_created. CloudEvents subject is session_id. hypothesis_text is truncated to 500 chars by the producer.

bead_id.description: beads id this session was opened for (e.g. deer-flow-ryj)

patron.description: human or agent who created the session

hypothesis_text.description: the trial card's hypothesis (truncated by producer)

project_name.description: target project the session is running against (e.g. tengine, nervous-bus)

trial_card_mode.description: rendering mode for the trial card (e.g. image, html)
